user_feedback: can you make it so that the game just freezes without the text and graying out. but also don't hide the hud when paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused, the HUD is completely hidden. The human wants the game to freeze without any overlay text or graying out, but the HUD should remain visible.
- Files affected: ui.js
- Changes needed: In the ui.render() method, when gamePhase is "PAUSED", render the HUD and fishing UI (same as when playing) instead of rendering nothing. This will keep the HUD visible while the game is frozen.
